title: Angorkis ramosa

The bioactive constituents of Andrographis paniculata include andrographolide, andrographolide glucoside, and rosmarinic acid, and it is often used to make herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, as well as being incorporated into traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine preparations.
